templates.note: POST workflowTemplate=image_upscale；lanczos 缩放 + 更高 megapixels/steps，真上采样后再走 Flux2。
POST workflowTemplate=background_repaint；提高 CFG + 中等 steps，配合背景向提示词。

prompt.en: Professional portrait retouch: even skin tone, natural catchlights, subtle sharpening, keep identity and pose unchanged.
prompt.zh: 人像精修：均匀肤色、自然眼神光、轻微锐化，保持五官与姿态不变。

prompt.en: Apply a subtle vintage film look: warm faded shadows, fine grain, slightly lowered contrast, keep composition unchanged.
prompt.zh: 复古胶片感：暖调褪色阴影、细腻颗粒、略降对比度，保持构图不变。

prompt.en: Clean ID-photo style: neutral background if possible, even lighting on face, natural color, no heavy makeup, keep subject unchanged.
prompt.zh: 证件照风格：背景尽量简洁中性、面部光线均匀、色彩自然、淡妆感，主体不变。

prompt.en: Enhance clarity and micro-detail: sharper edges, reduce noise, preserve original composition and content, avoid hallucinated new objects.
prompt.zh: 提升清晰度与细节：边缘更锐利、降噪，保持原构图与内容，不要凭空增加物体。

prompt.en: Replace or repaint ONLY the background; keep the foreground subject pixel-accurate with clean edges; seamless blend.
prompt.zh: 仅替换或重绘背景，前景主体边缘干净、与背景自然融合，不改变主体形状。
